metadata.description: Effectful test cases for hydra.lib.system primitives

literal.string: passes multiple arguments through to stdout
reports exit status zero for a successful program
reports a non-zero exit status as right (not an error)
leaves stdout empty when a program writes only to stderr
honors the environment field (replacing the child environment)
yields left(commandNotFound) for a missing program
does not contain a guaranteed-absent variable
yields none for a guaranteed-absent variable
returns a positive number of seconds since the epoch
Effectful test cases for hydra.lib.system primitives
